THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JOSE SANCHEZ, ALICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 475 FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWNS COSTS & FEES, EXCEPT WHICHEVER PARTY NEEDS ACTION TO ENFORCE TERMS MAY HAVE ATTY FEES. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
